basic_info.title: EarthBound
basic_info.review: EarthBound is a cult classic RPG praised for its unique modern setting, quirky humor, and innovative battle system. Despite initial commercial failure in the West, it has gained legendary status among retro gaming enthusiasts.

alternative_names: Mother 2: Gyiyg no Gyakushū (マザー2 ギーグの逆襲)

play_today.details: The most accessible official version with Nintendo's emulation. Includes the Player's Guide and runs smoothly on modern hardware.

recommended_patches.name: Mother 2: Perfect Edition
recommended_patches.description: The most complete re-localization patch. Uncensored script with refined dialogue closer to the original Japanese intent.

recommended_patches.name: EarthBound Consistency Patch
recommended_patches.description: Makes EarthBound more consistent with EarthBound Beginnings and Mother 3 in terms of terminology and style.

optimal_settings: CRT filter enabled for authentic look

play_today.details: Portable version with fan translation for Mother 1. Mother 2 only has menu translations but offers portability.

recommended_patches.name: Mother 1+2 Fan Translation
recommended_patches.description: Complete English translation for Mother 1 by Tomato and Jeffman. Mother 2 has menu translations only.

play_today.details: Original cartridge experience. Can be enhanced with unofficial patches for improved translation and bug fixes.

recommended_patches.name: Mother 2: Perfect Edition
recommended_patches.description: Uncensored re-localization with refined script and removed censorship from original release.

recommended_patches.name: MaternalBound Patch
recommended_patches.description: Earlier translation hack that Perfect Edition builds upon. Good alternative if you prefer its style.

play_today.details: Modern PC version with emulators offering flexibility and quality-of-life features.

recommended_patches.name: Mother 2: Perfect Edition
recommended_patches.description: Best translation patch for PC play. Uncensored and refined.

recommended_patches.name: EarthBound Ultimate Mod
recommended_patches.description: Fan-made remake with quality-of-life features including Red Text boxes option.

optimal_settings: SNES core set to accurate mode

description.synopsis: A young boy named Ness and his friends Paula, Jeff, and Poo travel the world collecting melodies from eight Sanctuaries to defeat the cosmic entity Giygas who threatens to destroy Earth.
key_features: Seamless overworld with no random encounters
PSI psychic powers unique to each character
Modern 1990s American setting for an RPG
Multiple endings based on player choices
description.long_description: EarthBound, known as Mother 2 in Japan, is a 1994 role-playing game developed by Ape Inc. and HAL Laboratory, published by Nintendo for the Super Nintendo Entertainment System. The second entry in the Mother series, it follows Ness and his companions on a quest to collect melodies from eight Sanctuaries to defeat Giygas, a cosmic entity threatening Earth. Unlike traditional RPGs of its era, EarthBound features a modern American setting with quirky humor, no random encounters (enemies appear directly on-screen), and an innovative rolling HP meter battle system. The game was initially poorly received in the West due to its cartoonish graphics and satirical marketing campaign ('This game stinks'), but has since gained legendary cult status. It influenced countless later RPGs including Undertale, Omori, and YIIK: A Postmodern RPG.
legacy_and_impact: Influenced modern indie RPGs like Undertale and Omori
Pioneered the seamless overworld without random encounters in Western RPGs
Created one of gaming's most dedicated fan communities (Starmen.net)
Ness became a staple character in Super Smash Bros. series
Considered one of the greatest SNES games and RPGs of all time
